Description: If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.

Chart type for the data layer. Possible values: `"area"`, `"area_percentage"`, `"area_stacked"`, `"bar"`, `"bar_horizontal"`, `"bar_horizontal_stacked"`, `"bar_horizontal_percentage"`, `"bar_percentage"`, `"bar_stacked"`, `"line"`.

Array of metrics to display on Y-axis. Items: `countMetricOperation`, `uniqueCountMetricOperation`, `minMaxAvgMedianStdDevMetricOperation`, `sumMetricOperation`, `lastValueOperation`, `percentileOperation`, `percentileRanksOperation`, `differencesOperation`, `movingAverageOperation`, `cumulativeSumOperation`, `counterRateOperation`, `formulaOperation`.
Collapse by function description. Possible values: `"avg"`, `"sum"`, `"max"`, `"min"`.
An ES|QL query that drives the data source. The query must produce a tabular result set; column names are used as field references. Example: "FROM logs-* | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY host.name".

ID of the axis definition this Y metric is bound to; links the metric to the matching axis configuration in axis.y or axis.secondary_y. If omitted, the metric is bound to the primary Y axis. Possible values: `"y"`, `"secondary_y"`.
The static color to be used for all values.
